title_en: Province pauses approvals for new renewable electricity generation
description_en: The Government of Alberta announced a pause on approvals of new renewable electricity generation projects, directing the regulator to halt processing of applications during a review period. A subsequent analysis estimated significant stalled private investment associated with the pause.
verification_notes: Batch-authored from didyouvoteforthis.ca harvest 2026-06-11 (1/1 existing-outlet sources resolved). Suppressed pending verification of date, framing, and the stalled-investment figure. TO ADD: the Pembina ~$33B estimate as a tier-3 CTX ref once the pembina-institute outlet exists (Bell rule: cannot load-bear without corroboration).
